response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions and architectural versatility demonstrate deep engineering craft, though lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and minimal mention of Kotlin/Java or security/authorization are notable gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Hands-on experience with AI-agent development and internal tooling
Strong open-source contributions and testing culture (Vitest-like tools, TDD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java or security/auth implementation experience
German language skill is basic, may hinder collaboration in Germany-based team
